q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is helpers.run_cmd(f'curl --insecure {url}'), which executes a shell command.

mock_guidance.target: Mock helpers.run_cmd to prevent shell execution.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the command string argument passed to helpers.run_cmd to observe the injected payload in the constructed URL.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Return a fake success object or string that allows execution to continue to the return statement without triggering actual network or shell side effects.
notes: The sink executes an external shell command, which is unsafe in a test environment.
The command injection payload will be visible in the first argument passed to the mocked helpers.run_cmd.
